nasb.text: But the land into which you are about to cross to possess it, a land of hills and valleys, drinks water from the rain of heaven,

esv.text: But the land that you are going over to possess is a land of hills and valleys, which drinks water by the rain from heaven,

cnv.text: 但你們要過去得為業的地，卻是一個有山有谷的地，有天上雨水滋潤的地，

ccb.text: 而你们将要占领的那片土地却有山有谷，雨水充足，
